author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Blocker: CUDA graph capture requires that the ENTIRE decode step is CPU-free — no Tensor construction, no data_vec, no CPU-side control flow. Our current decode path still creates Tensors (which involves CPU-side Arc allocation, shape computation, etc.) and calls data_vec to read logits. Full CUDA graph capture requires rewriting the decode path to operate ENTIRELY on raw GpuBufferHandles with no Rust heap allocations during the captured region. This is a fundamental architectural change — the Tensor abstraction layer must be bypassed completely for the graph-captured region. Pausing CUDA graph implementation — it requires more architectural work than is feasible in this session.
